source_conflicts.field_name: processing_time_minutes for 20 volume developer (line-wide mixing & processing table)
source_conflicts.reason: Both sources are official 2020 PDFs; the mini chart's dedicated Mixing & Processing table gives the wider range; recorded both, preferring the more detailed table.
Official Redken chart spelling preferred over distributor chart spelling.
US 2022 official chart preferred for the US canonical key; differences are diacritic-only.

issue_log: Direct download of the provided official 1001 Blondes subset chart URL (https://www.redkenpro.com/-/media/mediaassets/salonassets/haircolor/shades-eq-1001-blondes) returned an HTML/JavaScript bot-challenge page instead of a PDF; the 1001 Blondes subset chart could not be read.

The provided 2020 Color Gels Lacquers chart URL (.../2020-shade-charts/color-gels-lacquers-shade-chart.pdf) also returned a bot-challenge page; equivalent official 2020 mini and full-size Color Gels Lacquers chart PDFs were successfully fetched from alternate redkenpro.com /education/ media paths and used instead.

Shades EQ records are based on the official US 2022 mini shade chart (copyright 2021). Newer charts (2023-2026) were not located as parseable PDFs; any shades launched after that chart are missing. The redkenpro.com shade-chart hub page now points to a login-gated Asset Library.

Shades EQ pastels (Silver Green, Aqua Blue, Peach, Pink) and Color Kickers (Yellow, Orange, Red, Violet) are printed on the official chart by name only, without alphanumeric codes; they are recorded under their printed names.

The official US 2022 Shades EQ chart prints family names (e.g. Pearl, Matte, Natural Chocolate, Violet Blue, Gold Iridescent, Copper Red, Violet Violet, Natural Ash, Natural Warm, Ash Brown, Violet Rose, Auburn/Auburn Accent) in a header row, but the PDF text extraction does not preserve column alignment, so code-to-family-name pairings could not be confirmed for codes NA, NW, P, M, VB, AG, GI, NCh, VV, CR, ABn, VRo, AA, A, RR; manufacturer_tone_descriptions left empty for those codes.
Shades EQ chart key indicates some shades contain R5 red dye (visual icon); the icon-to-shade mapping is not recoverable from extracted text.
Official Redken AU mini chart (2013) lists shades 08MV Cedar and 07MV Birch, which do not appear on the US 2022 chart; they were excluded from the US records.

A large subset of the Shades EQ shade list is independently corroborated by the salon-services.com (UK distributor) A5 booklet chart PDF; no contradictions found beyond minor spelling variants logged in source_conflicts.

Color Gels Lacquers shade-level mixing ratio, developer and processing times are governed by the line-wide Mixing & Processing table (see line technical record); they are not stated per shade, so shade-level fields are null.
